title: heliophila brassicifolia
intro: Heliophila brassicifolia, also known as the yellow buttons or brass buttons, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and soothing skin irritations, and has been used to treat conditions like rheumatism and digestive issues. Heliophila brassicifolia can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and has been used by herbalists and traditional healers for its potential therapeutic properties.
